#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
hpc_cuda_optimizer_extract.py
Self-extracting archive for the HPC CUDA Optimizer repository.
Run this script once to recreate the full directory tree:

    python3 hpc_cuda_optimizer_extract.py

The folder  hpc-cuda-optimizer/  will be created in the current directory.
"""
import base64, zipfile, io, os, sys, stat

ARCHIVE_B64 = """"""

def main():
    raw = base64.b64decode(ARCHIVE_B64)
    zf  = zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(raw))
    out = os.getcwd()
    print(f"Extracting to: {out}")
    zf.extractall(out)
    # Make shell scripts executable
    for info in zf.infolist():
        path = os.path.join(out, info.filename)
        if info.filename.endswith((".sh", ".slurm", ".py")):
            os.chmod(path, os.stat(path).st_mode | stat.S_IXUSR | stat.S_IXGRP | stat.S_IXOTH)
    files = zf.namelist()
    print(f"Done — extracted {len(files)} files:")
    for f in sorted(files):
        print(f"  {f}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
